Jiangsu JieJie Microelectronics Co., Ltd. Reports Earnings Results for the Nine Months Ended September 30, 2025
data.description:
Jiangsu JieJie Microelectronics Co., Ltd. reported earnings results for the nine months ended September 30, 2025. For the nine months, the company reported sales was CNY 2,501.54 million compared to CNY 2,006.01 million a year ago. Revenue was CNY 2,501.54 million compared to CNY 2,006.01 million a year ago.

Net income was CNY 346.92 million compared to CNY 332.63 million a year ago. Basic earnings per share from continuing operations was CNY 0.42 compared to CNY 0.45 a year ago. Diluted earnings per share from continuing operations was CNY 0.42 compared to CNY 0.43 a year ago.

data.title: Bridgestone Corporation Announces Chief Executive Officer Changes, Effective January 1, 2026
data.description:
Bridgestone Corporation announced that its Board of Directors approved the change in Global CEO and Representative Executive Officer position and responsibility. Effective January 1, 2026, Shuichi Ishibashi will be succeeded by Yasuhiro Morita as Global CEO. Yasuhiro MORITA was born on December 25, 1972.

He joined Bridgestone Corporation in 1996, served as Managing Director, Seconded to Thai Bridgestone Co. Ltd. in 2016, Managing Director, Seconded to Bridgestone (China) Investment Co. Ltd. in 2018, CEO, Seconded to Bridgestone Asia Pacific Pte.

Ltd. in 2023, Vice President and Senior Officer in 2024, Executive Vice President and Representative Executive Officer in 2025, and will become Global CEO and Representative Executive Officer in 2026. He has great experience of tire business in overseas market mainly in Europe and Asia. After 2025, he has been responsible for the cross-functional and global optimization as Global CAO (Chief Administration Officer)·Global CSO (Chief Strategy Officer), in charge of quality management, finance, public relations, human resources, sustainability, digital transformation, product strategy, procurement, supply chain management and motorsports.

data.title: Bridgestone Corporation Announces Board and Executive Changes
data.description: Bridgestone Corporation announced that Shuichi ISHIBASHI will retire from the position of Representative Executive Officer on December 31, 2025, and Member of the Board upon the expiration of his term at the Company's Annual Shareholders' Meeting scheduled to be held in March 2026.
